list.name: reporting_month
list.label: Order cohort month
list.query: SELECT year_month FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT year_month FROM dw.dim_date UNION SELECT to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS year_month ) t ORDER BY year_month DESC
list.definition: SELECT year_month FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT year_month FROM dw.dim_date UNION SELECT to_char(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS year_month ) t ORDER BY year_month DESC

options.content: **Batch DW metrics** from schema `dw`, aligned with assignment Table 4. Filter uses **order date** month (`dim_date.year_month`). Run `scripts/load_delivery_quality_dw.sql` or `scripts/run_dw_etl.ps1` / `run_dw_etl.sh` first; see `DWH.md`. Datasource: **Supply Chain DW** (PostgreSQL).

targets.rawSql: WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_not_yet_delivered, f.is_on_time, f.is_late_under_1_week, f.is_late_under_2_weeks, f.is_late_over_2_weeks FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM( is_not_yet_delivered + is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks ), 0)::integer AS value FROM scoped

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_not_yet_delivered, f.is_on_time, f.is_late_under_1_week, f.is_late_under_2_weeks, f.is_late_over_2_weeks FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ), agg AS ( SELECT SUM(is_on_time) AS num, SUM( is_not_yet_delivered + is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks ) AS denom FROM scoped ) SELECT CASE WHEN denom IS NULL OR denom = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (num::double precision / denom::double precision) END AS value FROM agg

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_not_yet_delivered FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(is_not_yet_delivered), 0)::integer AS value FROM scoped

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_on_time, f.is_late_under_1_week, f.is_late_under_2_weeks, f.is_late_over_2_weeks FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM( is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks ), 0)::integer AS value FROM scoped

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_not_yet_delivered, f.is_on_time, f.is_late_under_1_week, f.is_late_under_2_weeks, f.is_late_over_2_weeks FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ), agg AS ( SELECT SUM(is_late_under_1_week) AS num, SUM( is_not_yet_delivered + is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks ) AS denom FROM scoped ) SELECT CASE WHEN denom IS NULL OR denom = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (num::double precision / denom::double precision) END AS value FROM agg

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_not_yet_delivered, f.is_on_time, f.is_late_under_1_week, f.is_late_under_2_weeks, f.is_late_over_2_weeks FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ), agg AS ( SELECT SUM(is_late_under_2_weeks) AS num, SUM( is_not_yet_delivered + is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks ) AS denom FROM scoped ) SELECT CASE WHEN denom IS NULL OR denom = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (num::double precision / denom::double precision) END AS value FROM agg

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_not_yet_delivered, f.is_on_time, f.is_late_under_1_week, f.is_late_under_2_weeks, f.is_late_over_2_weeks FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ), agg AS ( SELECT SUM(is_late_over_2_weeks) AS num, SUM( is_not_yet_delivered + is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks ) AS denom FROM scoped ) SELECT CASE WHEN denom IS NULL OR denom = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (num::double precision / denom::double precision) END AS value FROM agg

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT f.is_not_yet_delivered, f.is_on_time, f.is_late_under_1_week, f.is_late_under_2_weeks, f.is_late_over_2_weeks FROM dw.fact_delivery_quality f JOIN dw.dim_date dd ON dd.date_key = f.order_date_key WHERE dd.year_month = '${reporting_month}' ), agg AS ( SELECT SUM(is_not_yet_delivered + is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks) AS total_orders, SUM(is_on_time + is_late_under_1_week + is_late_under_2_weeks + is_late_over_2_weeks) AS delivery_successful, SUM(is_not_yet_delivered) AS not_yet_delivered, SUM(is_on_time) AS on_time_count, SUM(is_late_under_1_week) AS late_1w, SUM(is_late_under_2_weeks) AS late_2w, SUM(is_late_over_2_weeks) AS late_2wp FROM scoped ) SELECT '${reporting_month}'::text AS reporting_month, agg.total_orders::integer, agg.delivery_successful::integer, agg.not_yet_delivered::integer, CASE WHEN agg.total_orders IS NULL OR agg.total_orders = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((agg.on_time_count::numeric / agg.total_orders::numeric), 4) END AS on_time_delivery_rate, CASE WHEN agg.total_orders IS NULL OR agg.total_orders = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((agg.late_1w::numeric / agg.total_orders::numeric), 4) END AS late_under_1_week_rate, CASE WHEN agg.total_orders IS NULL OR agg.total_orders = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((agg.late_2w::numeric / agg.total_orders::numeric), 4) END AS late_under_2_weeks_rate, CASE WHEN agg.total_orders IS NULL OR agg.total_orders = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((agg.late_2wp::numeric / agg.total_orders::numeric), 4) END AS late_over_2_weeks_rate FROM agg
